title: Revenue route has no direct coverage for its fee error and approximation states
reasoning: The revenue page owns non-trivial user-visible behavior: it blanks totals on network/rates/snapshot errors, marks truncated or unpriced data as approximate, and forwards those degraded states to the tile, chart, and pool leaderboard. The included associated tests cover the global overview, address-book, bridge-flows, pool, and pools pages, but none import or render `RevenuePageClient` or `RevenuePage`. Component-level tests for hooks/table helpers do not pin this route's wiring, so a route-local regression such as passing only `anyNetworkError` to the table, omitting `feeSnapshotsError` from `anyFeesError`, or losing the approximation subtitle would not be caught by the listed route tests.
recommendation: Add a focused `ui-dashboard/src/app/revenue/__tests__/page.test.tsx` or `_components/revenue-page-client.test.tsx` that mocks `useProtocolFees` and asserts all-success, network failure, rates/fee snapshot failure, truncated snapshot, and unpriced/unresolved states across the tile, chart props/markup, and leaderboard shell.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: The searched included tests do not reference `RevenuePage`, `RevenuePageClient`, `/revenue`, or the `Protocol Revenue` heading. Existing global overview tests exercise similar aggregation logic in `ui-dashboard/src/app/page-client.tsx`, but this route duplicates its own wiring and uses the slim `useProtocolFees` hook, so those tests do not fail if the revenue route regresses.
suggestedRegressionTest: Mock `@/hooks/use-protocol-fees` to return one healthy network and one network with `feeSnapshotsError`, render `RevenuePageClient`, and assert the swap-fee headline is `N/A`, the chart shows partial data, and `RevenueByPoolTable` receives/prints the degraded per-pool state. Add separate cases for `feeSnapshotsTruncated` and unpriced symbols to assert the `≈` prefix and approximation subtitle.
minimumFixScope: Add route-level tests for `ui-dashboard/src/app/revenue/_components/revenue-page-client.tsx`; no production code change is required for this finding.

history.note: Fixed by adding direct RevenuePageClient degraded-state tests for fee errors and approximate/truncated data.
